text: Testing plays a vital role in modern software development. Unit tests check small pieces of code individually, ensuring each function works correctly on its own. Integration tests then verify that different parts of the application work together smoothly. One popular approach is test-driven development, where developers write tests before writing the actual code. This method helps prevent bugs early in the process. Overall, testing provides confidence that the software behaves as expected. When tests pass, developers know their changes haven't broken anything. This confidence allows teams to release updates more frequently and safely.
